title: Super Siegecraft
description: A colony protection pack with super powered potential.
body:
# Welcome to Super Siegecraft!
This pack is a Minecolonies based pack that introduces a lot of different dangers for your colony including but not limited to...
- Massive Waves of Zombies
- Huge Storms
- Smarter Zombies
- New Dangerous creatures
- and more!!

Defend your colonies with an abundance of defenses such as shields, turrets, and companions! You can also turn yourself into a powerhouse if you wanted to, giving yourself powers from the many Palladium Addons!



This currently uses a beta version of Minecolonies, so don't be surprised if there are updates coming soon.
